author: vnlitvinov
text: Currently stdout/stderr of rpyc server is not logged, and it can contain clues needed for bug hunting, so we should store it when `MODIN_LOG_RPYC` is set.

author: vnlitvinov
text: FEAT-[modin-project#2108](https://github.com/modin-project/modin/issues/2108): Save rpyc server output if rpyc logging is on
